nasb.text: For I could wish that I myself were accursed, separated from Christ for the sake of my brethren, my kinsmen according to the flesh,

esv.text: For I could wish that I myself were accursed and cut off from Christ for the sake of my brothers, my kinsmen according to the flesh.

cnv.text: 為我的同胞，就是我骨肉之親，就算自己受咒詛，與基督隔絕，我也甘心。

ccb.text: 为了我的弟兄——我的同胞以色列人，即使我自己被咒诅、与基督隔绝，我也愿意！

csbs.text: 为了我的同胞，我的骨肉之亲，就算我自己被诅咒、与基督分离，我也愿意。
